requirement_topic.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU — Emissions and Immunity for GaN Fast Chargers / USB-C Adapters (Multimedia/ICT Equipment Route)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC指令2014/30/EU——GaN快速充电器/USB-C适配器的发射与抗扰度要求（多媒体/ICT设备路径）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC指令2014/30/EU——GaN快速充電器/USB-C適配器的發射與抗擾度要求（多媒體/ICT設備路徑）

summary.en: GaN fast chargers and USB-C power adapters placed on the EU market as standalone power supply units or accessories to multimedia/ICT equipment are subject to the legally binding essential requirements of EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (OJ L 96, 29.3.2014): the equipment shall not generate electromagnetic disturbance exceeding levels that prevent radio and telecommunications equipment from functioning as intended, and shall have adequate immunity to electromagnetic disturbance to operate as intended. Manufacturers self-declare conformity via an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and affix CE marking. Harmonised EMC standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity. Commonly used standards for multimedia and ICT equipment include EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 (emissions), EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 (immunity), EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 (harmonic current emissions) and EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 (voltage fluctuations and flicker). Applying cited harmonised standards can support presumption of conformity, but alternatives are allowed if the technical file demonstrates compliance with the Directive. [UNVERIFIED: the exact OJ citation dates for these standards under 2014/30/EU should be confirmed against the current EC harmonised standards list before regulatory submission.]
summary.zh: 作为独立电源或多媒体/ICT设备配件投放欧盟市场的GaN快速充电器和USB-C电源适配器，须符合具有法律约束力的EMC指令2014/30/EU（欧盟官方公报L 96，2014年3月29日）的基本要求：设备产生的电磁骚扰不得超过妨碍无线电及电信设备正常工作的限值，且须具备足够的电磁抗扰能力以确保预期功能。制造商通过签署EU符合性声明（DoC）并加贴CE标志进行自我声明。协调EMC标准是取得合规推定的自愿路径。多媒体和ICT设备常用标准包括EN 55032:2015/A11:2020（发射）、EN 55035:2017/A11:2020（抗扰度）、EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（谐波电流发射）和EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（电压波动与闪烁）。采用已引用的协调标准可支持合规推定，但如技术文件能够证明符合指令要求，也可采用替代方案。【未经核实：上述标准在2014/30/EU下的官方公报具体引用日期，须在监管提交前对照欧盟委员会当前协调标准列表确认。】
summary.zht: 作為獨立電源或多媒體/ICT設備配件投放歐盟市場的GaN快速充電器和USB-C電源適配器，須符合具有法律約束力的EMC指令2014/30/EU（歐盟官方公報L 96，2014年3月29日）的基本要求：設備產生的電磁騷擾不得超過妨礙無線電及電信設備正常工作的限值，且須具備足夠的電磁抗擾能力以確保預期功能。製造商通過簽署EU符合性聲明（DoC）並加貼CE標誌進行自我聲明。協調EMC標準是取得合規推定的自願路徑。多媒體和ICT設備常用標準包括EN 55032:2015/A11:2020（發射）、EN 55035:2017/A11:2020（抗擾度）、EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（諧波電流發射）和EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（電壓波動與閃爍）。採用已引用的協調標準可支持合規推定，但如技術文件能夠證明符合指令要求，也可採用替代方案。【未經核實：上述標準在2014/30/EU下的官方公報具體引用日期，須在監管提交前對照歐盟委員會當前協調標準列表確認。】

standards_or_laws: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (based on CISPR 32:2015; harmonised under 2014/30/EU — verify current OJ citation)
EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (based on CISPR 35:2016; harmonised under 2014/30/EU — verify current OJ citation)
EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current up to 16 A per phase; harmonised under 2014/30/EU)
EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (equipment with rated current up to 16 A per phase)

summary.en: China's primary EMC standards for multimedia and ICT equipment — including GaN fast chargers and USB-C adapters — are GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, IDT CISPR 32:2015, recommended) and GB/T 9254.2-2021 (immunity, IDT CISPR 35:2016, recommended), which are the direct Chinese adoptions of the same CISPR base documents as EN 55032 and EN 55035. For harmonic current emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) is the CN mandatory equivalent of EN IEC 61000-3-2. A key structural difference is that in China, GB/T 9254.1 and GB/T 9254.2 carry recommended (GB/T) status for most product categories, whereas mandatory EMC enforcement for consumer products is primarily achieved via China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for products in the CCC catalogue, or via SAMR market surveillance enforcement of GB 4343.1-2009 (based on CISPR 14-1:2005, mandatory, for household appliances including power supplies). [UNVERIFIED: whether GaN fast chargers sold as standalone products in China fall under CCC catalogue coverage and which mandatory standard applies — GB 4343.1 (household appliances) or GB/T 9254.1 (multimedia/ICT) — depends on product classification and should be confirmed with SAMR/CNCA before regulatory submission.] For voltage fluctuation and flicker, GB 17625.2-2007 (mandatory, based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005) is the CN parallel to EN IEC 61000-3-3.
summary.zh: 中国针对多媒体和ICT设备（包括GaN快速充电器和USB-C适配器）的主要EMC标准为：GB/T 9254.1-2021（发射，等同CISPR 32:2015，推荐性）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（抗扰度，等同CISPR 35:2016，推荐性），是与EN 55032和EN 55035基础相同的CISPR文件的中国等同采用版本。谐波电流发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）是EN IEC 61000-3-2在中国的强制性等效标准。重要结构差异在于：在中国，GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2对大多数产品类别仅具推荐性（GB/T），而针对消费品的强制性EMC执行主要通过：CCC目录内产品的中国强制认证（CCC），或SAMR市场监管对GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1:2005，强制性，适用于包括电源在内的家用电器）的执法。【未经核实：在中国作为独立产品销售的GaN快速充电器是否纳入CCC目录，以及适用的强制性标准（GB 4343.1家用电器或GB/T 9254.1多媒体/ICT）——取决于产品分类，须在监管提交前向SAMR/CNCA确认。】电压波动与闪烁方面，GB 17625.2-2007（强制性，基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005）是EN IEC 61000-3-3在中国的对应标准。
summary.zht: 中國針對多媒體和ICT設備（包括GaN快速充電器和USB-C適配器）的主要EMC標準為：GB/T 9254.1-2021（發射，等同CISPR 32:2015，推薦性）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（抗擾度，等同CISPR 35:2016，推薦性），是與EN 55032和EN 55035基礎相同的CISPR文件的中國等同採用版本。諧波電流發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）是EN IEC 61000-3-2在中國的強制性等效標準。重要結構差異在於：在中國，GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2對大多數產品類別僅具推薦性（GB/T），而針對消費品的強制性EMC執行主要通過：CCC目錄內產品的中國強制認證（CCC），或SAMR市場監管對GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1:2005，強制性，適用於包括電源在內的家用電器）的執法。【未經核實：在中國作為獨立產品銷售的GaN快速充電器是否納入CCC目錄，以及適用的強制性標準（GB 4343.1家用電器或GB/T 9254.1多媒體/ICT）——取決於產品分類，須在監管提交前向SAMR/CNCA確認。】電壓波動與閃爍方面，GB 17625.2-2007（強制性，基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005）是EN IEC 61000-3-3在中國的對應標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 32:2015)
GB/T 9254.2-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 35:2016)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions, input current up to 16 A per phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)
GB 17625.2-2007 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (mandatory; based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005)

GB 4343.1-2009 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; based on CISPR 14-1:2005) [UNVERIFIED: applicability to standalone GaN chargers vs GB/T 9254.1 depends on CN product classification — confirm with SAMR/CNCA]

gap.en: Three gaps exist between Chinese domestic EMC compliance and EU market entry for GaN fast chargers: (1) Legal-status asymmetry — the mandatory EU obligation is conformity with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and CE/DoC requirements; EN 55032/EN 55035 and related EN IEC standards are voluntary harmonised standards that can confer presumption of conformity. The CN equivalents GB/T 9254.1/9254.2 are recommended standards, meaning a Chinese manufacturer may hold no test report to these standards at all, relying instead on CCC certification or voluntary testing only. (2) Documentation re-issuance — even where GB/T 9254.1 test results are technically equivalent to EN 55032, an EU DoC normally cites the EN-designated technical basis or otherwise justifies an alternative route in the technical file; existing CNAS-accredited CN test reports may need re-issuance or supplementary evidence for EU use. (3) Harmonic standard edition lag — GB 17625.2-2007 is based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005 whereas the EU harmonised edition commonly used is EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021; methodology differences may affect flicker assessment outcomes between CN and EU reports.
gap.zh: GaN快速充电器从中国国内EMC合规到欧盟市场准入存在三项差距：（1）法律地位不对称——欧盟的强制性义务是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU以及CE/DoC要求；EN 55032/EN 55035及相关EN IEC标准是自愿协调标准，可赋予合规推定。中国等效标准GB/T 9254.1/9254.2为推荐性，中国制造商可能根本未持有上述标准的检测报告，仅依赖CCC认证或自愿检测。（2）文件重新签发——即便GB/T 9254.1检测结果在技术上等效于EN 55032，EU符合性声明通常须引用EN编号技术依据，或在技术文件中论证替代路径；现有CNAS认可的中国检测报告可能需要重新签发或补充证据方可用于欧盟。（3）谐波标准版本滞后——GB 17625.2-2007基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而欧盟常用协调版本为EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021；方法论差异可能影响中欧报告之间闪烁评估结果。
gap.zht: GaN快速充電器從中國國內EMC合規到歐盟市場準入存在三項差距：（1）法律地位不對稱——歐盟的強制性義務是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU以及CE/DoC要求；EN 55032/EN 55035及相關EN IEC標準是自願協調標準，可賦予合規推定。中國等效標準GB/T 9254.1/9254.2為推薦性，中國製造商可能根本未持有上述標準的檢測報告，僅依賴CCC認證或自願檢測。（2）文件重新簽發——即便GB/T 9254.1檢測結果在技術上等效於EN 55032，EU符合性聲明通常須引用EN編號技術依據，或在技術文件中論證替代路徑；現有CNAS認可的中國檢測報告可能需要重新簽發或補充證據方可用於歐盟。（3）諧波標準版本滯後——GB 17625.2-2007基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而歐盟常用協調版本為EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021；方法論差異可能影響中歐報告之間閃爍評估結果。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — conformity with Directive 2014/30/EU, EU DoC and CE marking are required for EU market access. EN 55032, EN 55035, EN IEC 61000-3-2 and EN IEC 61000-3-3 are voluntary harmonised standards that can confer presumption of conformity; alternatives are allowed if conformity is demonstrated.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB/T 9254.2-2021 are recommended (GB/T) — not legally compulsory as standalone requirements for most product categories. GB 17625.1-2022 and GB 17625.2-2007 are mandatory (GB). CCC mandatory certification may apply depending on product classification under the CNCA catalogue. [UNVERIFIED: CCC scope for standalone GaN chargers — confirm with SAMR/CNCA]

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese GaN fast charger manufacturers holding only CN domestic EMC test reports (GB/T 9254.1-2021, GB/T 9254.2-2021, or generic GB harmonic series) should not assume those reports are enough for EU CE marking. The binding EU requirement is conformity with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, supported by an EU DoC and technical file. A dedicated EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2 test campaign at an appropriately accredited laboratory is a common way to support presumption of conformity, but it is a voluntary harmonised-standard route rather than the legal obligation itself. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅持有国内EMC检测报告（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB/T 9254.2-2021或通用GB谐波系列）的中国GaN快速充电器制造商，不应假定这些报告足以支持欧盟CE标志。具有约束力的欧盟要求是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，并由EU符合性声明和技术文件支持。在适当认可的实验室开展EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2专项检测，是支持合规推定的常见方式，但这是自愿协调标准路径，而非法律义务本身。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅持有國內EMC檢測報告（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB/T 9254.2-2021或通用GB諧波系列）的中國GaN快速充電器製造商，不應假定這些報告足以支持歐盟CE標誌。具有約束力的歐盟要求是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，並由EU符合性聲明和技術文件支持。在適當認可的實驗室開展EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2專項檢測，是支持合規推定的常見方式，但這是自願協調標準路徑，而非法律義務本身。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: GaN High-Frequency Switching EMI — Design Challenge and EU Compliance Implications
requirement_topic.zh: GaN高频开关EMI——设计挑战与欧盟合规影响
requirement_topic.zht: GaN高頻開關EMI——設計挑戰與歐盟合規影響

summary.en: GaN (gallium nitride) transistors switch at significantly higher frequencies (typically 100 kHz to several MHz) and with steeper dV/dt and dI/dt slew rates than conventional silicon MOSFETs, inherently generating broadband conducted and radiated EMI at frequencies that extend well into the EN 55032 measurement range (conducted: 150 kHz to 30 MHz; radiated: 30 MHz to 1 GHz). The EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU imposes the mandatory legal requirement that GaN fast chargers and USB-C adapters meet essential emission and immunity requirements regardless of switching technology. EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 and EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 are voluntary harmonised standards commonly used to demonstrate presumption of conformity for multimedia equipment. The high switching frequency of GaN devices means that harmonic content from the switching waveform can directly fall within the EN 55032 conducted emission window, making adequate PCB layout, gate drive design, shielding, common-mode choke selection, and Y-capacitor placement critical design controls. [UNVERIFIED: specific GaN switching frequency ranges and EMI spectral behaviour vary by device manufacturer, topology, and operating point — consult device datasheets and application notes for product-specific EMI characterisation before test planning.]
summary.zh: 氮化镓（GaN）晶体管的开关频率（通常为100 kHz至数MHz）和dV/dt、dI/dt压摆率显著高于传统硅MOSFET，固有产生宽带传导和辐射EMI，其频率范围延伸至EN 55032测试窗口（传导：150 kHz至30 MHz；辐射：30 MHz至1 GHz）内。EU EMC指令2014/30/EU规定了强制性法律要求，即GaN快速充电器和USB-C适配器无论使用何种开关技术，均须满足基本发射和抗扰度要求。EN 55032:2015/A11:2020和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020是常用于多媒体设备合规推定的自愿协调标准。GaN器件的高开关频率使开关波形的谐波成分可直接落入EN 55032传导发射窗口，因此充分的PCB布局、栅极驱动设计、屏蔽、共模扼流圈选型及Y电容放置是关键设计控制。【未经核实：具体GaN开关频率范围和EMI频谱特性因器件制造商、拓扑结构和工作点而异——在测试规划前请查阅器件数据手册和应用笔记以获取产品专项EMI特性数据。】
summary.zht: 氮化鎵（GaN）電晶體的開關頻率（通常為100 kHz至數MHz）和dV/dt、dI/dt壓擺率顯著高於傳統矽MOSFET，固有產生寬帶傳導和輻射EMI，其頻率範圍延伸至EN 55032測試窗口（傳導：150 kHz至30 MHz；輻射：30 MHz至1 GHz）內。EU EMC指令2014/30/EU規定了強制性法律要求，即GaN快速充電器和USB-C適配器無論使用何種開關技術，均須滿足基本發射和抗擾度要求。EN 55032:2015/A11:2020和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020是常用於多媒體設備合規推定的自願協調標準。GaN器件的高開關頻率使開關波形的諧波成分可直接落入EN 55032傳導發射窗口，因此充分的PCB佈局、柵極驅動設計、屏蔽、共模扼流圈選型及Y電容放置是關鍵設計控制。【未經核實：具體GaN開關頻率範圍和EMI頻譜特性因器件製造商、拓撲結構和工作點而異——在測試規劃前請查閱器件數據手冊和應用筆記以獲取產品專項EMI特性數據。】

standards_or_laws: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements; Class B conducted limits: 150 kHz–500 kHz quasi-peak 66 dBuV / average 56 dBuV; 500 kHz–30 MHz quasi-peak 60 dBuV / average 50 dBuV (based on CISPR 32:2015)
EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (based on CISPR 35:2016)

EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current up to 16 A per phase; Class D limits apply to equipment with rated power up to 600 W with certain waveform characteristics)

summary.en: China does not have a GaN-technology-specific EMC standard. The same GB/T 9254.1-2021 (IDT CISPR 32:2015, recommended) and GB 4343.1-2009 (mandatory, CISPR 14-1:2005, for household appliance-category power supplies) emission limits apply to GaN chargers as to any other switched-mode power supply sold in China. The conducted emission measurement range under GB/T 9254.1-2021 is 150 kHz–30 MHz (same as CISPR 32), meaning GaN high-frequency switching harmonics fall within the same test window as in the EU. In practice, Chinese manufacturers seeking domestic CCC certification or voluntarily testing to GB/T 9254.1 face the same broadband EMI challenges from GaN switching as their EU-bound counterparts, but the CN framework lacks a mandatory harmonised-standards mechanism that universally compels CISPR 32-level testing for all product categories — enforcement depends on the certification scheme applicable to the product. [UNVERIFIED: whether mandatory GB 4343.1-2009 (CISPR 14-1:2005 base) or recommended GB/T 9254.1-2021 (CISPR 32:2015 base) applies as the primary CN EMC emission standard for a given GaN charger product depends on CN product classification — confirm with test laboratory before CN certification.]
summary.zh: 中国尚无针对GaN技术的专项EMC标准。适用于中国市场GaN充电器的发射限值与其他开关电源相同：GB/T 9254.1-2021（等同CISPR 32:2015，推荐性）和GB 4343.1-2009（强制性，基于CISPR 14-1:2005，适用于家用电器类电源）。GB/T 9254.1-2021的传导发射测量范围为150 kHz至30 MHz（与CISPR 32相同），意味着GaN高频开关谐波落入与欧盟相同的测试窗口内。实践中，寻求国内CCC认证或自愿按GB/T 9254.1检测的中国制造商面临与欧盟出口产品相同的GaN宽带EMI挑战，但中国框架缺乏强制所有产品类别进行CISPR 32级别测试的普遍强制协调标准机制——执行取决于产品适用的认证体系。【未经核实：对于特定GaN充电器产品，强制性GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1:2005）还是推荐性GB/T 9254.1-2021（基于CISPR 32:2015）作为主要中国EMC发射标准，取决于中国产品分类——须在中国认证前与检测实验室确认。】
summary.zht: 中國尚無針對GaN技術的專項EMC標準。適用於中國市場GaN充電器的發射限值與其他開關電源相同：GB/T 9254.1-2021（等同CISPR 32:2015，推薦性）和GB 4343.1-2009（強制性，基於CISPR 14-1:2005，適用於家用電器類電源）。GB/T 9254.1-2021的傳導發射測量範圍為150 kHz至30 MHz（與CISPR 32相同），意味著GaN高頻開關諧波落入與歐盟相同的測試窗口內。實踐中，尋求國內CCC認證或自願按GB/T 9254.1檢測的中國製造商面臨與歐盟出口產品相同的GaN寬帶EMI挑戰，但中國框架缺乏強制所有產品類別進行CISPR 32級別測試的普遍強制協調標準機制——執行取決於產品適用的認證體系。【未經核實：對於特定GaN充電器產品，強制性GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1:2005）還是推薦性GB/T 9254.1-2021（基於CISPR 32:2015）作為主要中國EMC發射標準，取決於中國產品分類——須在中國認證前與檢測實驗室確認。】

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 32:2015; conducted measurement range 150 kHz–30 MHz)

GB 4343.1-2009 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; based on CISPR 14-1:2005) [UNVERIFIED: applicability to GaN chargers depends on CN product classification]
GB 17625.1-2022 — Harmonic current emissions, up to 16 A per phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The GaN EMI gap has two dimensions: (1) Technology-driven EMI spectrum gap — GaN switching harmonics can fall within the EN 55032 Class B conducted emission measurement window. Silicon MOSFET designs previously assessed against EU EMC requirements may not be directly substitutable with GaN without updated evidence, because GaN switching can generate substantially more high-frequency content. Chinese manufacturers who qualified a silicon-MOSFET version for the EU market and then migrate to GaN should reassess the GaN variant and update the EU technical file and DoC as needed. (2) CN-to-EU framework evidence gap — a CN test report to GB/T 9254.1-2021 may be technically useful, but the EU file must demonstrate conformity with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, commonly by citing voluntary EN harmonised standards or by justifying an alternative technical route. Reports only to GB 4343.1-2009 (CISPR 14-1 base) may be further from the EN 55032 route because methods and frequency ranges differ. [UNVERIFIED: specific dBuV figures should be verified from the current standard text before test planning.]
gap.zh: GaN EMI差距具有两个维度：（1）技术驱动的EMI频谱差距——GaN开关谐波可能落入EN 55032 B级传导发射测量窗口。此前按欧盟EMC要求评估通过的硅MOSFET设计，在切换至GaN时不应在没有更新证据的情况下直接沿用，因为GaN开关可能产生更多高频成分。已为欧盟市场认证硅MOSFET版本后迁移至GaN的中国制造商，应重新评估GaN变体，并按需更新欧盟技术文件和DoC。（2）中国至欧盟框架证据差距——按GB/T 9254.1-2021出具的中国检测报告可具有技术参考价值，但欧盟文件须证明符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，通常通过引用自愿EN协调标准，或论证替代技术路径。仅依据GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1）的报告，因测量方法和频率范围不同，可能与EN 55032路径差距更大。【未经核实：具体dBuV数值须在测试规划前对照当前标准文本核实。】
gap.zht: GaN EMI差距具有兩個維度：（1）技術驅動的EMI頻譜差距——GaN開關諧波可能落入EN 55032 B級傳導發射測量窗口。此前按歐盟EMC要求評估通過的矽MOSFET設計，在切換至GaN時不應在沒有更新證據的情況下直接沿用，因為GaN開關可能產生更多高頻成分。已為歐盟市場認證矽MOSFET版本後遷移至GaN的中國製造商，應重新評估GaN變體，並按需更新歐盟技術文件和DoC。（2）中國至歐盟框架證據差距——按GB/T 9254.1-2021出具的中國檢測報告可具有技術參考價值，但歐盟文件須證明符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，通常通過引用自願EN協調標準，或論證替代技術路徑。僅依據GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1）的報告，因測量方法和頻率範圍不同，可能與EN 55032路徑差距更大。【未經核實：具體dBuV數值須在測試規劃前對照當前標準文本核實。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — conformity with Directive 2014/30/EU, EU DoC and CE marking are required. EN 55032 Class B and related EN EMC standards are voluntary harmonised standards commonly used to obtain presumption of conformity for residential-use multimedia equipment; they are not the legal obligation itself.
mandatory_status.cn: No GaN-specific mandatory CN EMC standard exists. GB 17625.1-2022 is mandatory for harmonic emissions. GB/T 9254.1-2021 is recommended. GB 4343.1-2009 is mandatory for household appliance category products. CCC mandatory certification requirements depend on product classification. [UNVERIFIED: confirm applicable mandatory CN standard with test laboratory based on product category]

compliance_verdict.en: GaN charger manufacturers migrating from silicon MOSFET designs, or using GaN for the first time, should treat EU EMC evidence as needing reassessment: GaN high-frequency switching content can fall directly in the EN 55032 conducted emission window. Chinese manufacturers holding only CN domestic test reports (GB/T 9254.1, GB 4343.1, or harmonic-only GB series) cannot assume those reports alone demonstrate EU compliance. The legal obligation is conformity with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, supported by an EU DoC and technical file; EN 55032, EN 55035 and EN IEC 61000-3-2 testing is a common voluntary harmonised-standard route to presumption of conformity. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 从硅MOSFET设计迁移至GaN，或首次使用GaN的充电器制造商，应将EU EMC证据视为需要重新评估：GaN高频开关成分可能直接落入EN 55032传导发射窗口。仅持有中国国内检测报告（GB/T 9254.1、GB 4343.1或纯谐波GB系列）的中国制造商，不能假定这些报告本身足以证明欧盟合规。法律义务是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，并由EU符合性声明和技术文件支持；EN 55032、EN 55035及EN IEC 61000-3-2检测是取得合规推定的常见自愿协调标准路径。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 從矽MOSFET設計遷移至GaN，或首次使用GaN的充電器製造商，應將EU EMC證據視為需要重新評估：GaN高頻開關成分可能直接落入EN 55032傳導發射窗口。僅持有中國國內檢測報告（GB/T 9254.1、GB 4343.1或純諧波GB系列）的中國製造商，不能假定這些報告本身足以證明歐盟合規。法律義務是符合EMC指令2014/30/EU，並由EU符合性聲明和技術文件支持；EN 55032、EN 55035及EN IEC 61000-3-2檢測是取得合規推定的常見自願協調標準路徑。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
